items.title: notes of a techno hippie
items.summary: I will be using this site to keep and organise things that i need for projects that i know will be useful for others and…
items.content_html: I will be using this site to keep and organise things that i need for projects that i know will be useful for others and myself as well... so when... after months have passed and i need to circle back to something. Guess what it will be here with a tag and easy to find.
